<!--
Thank you for contributing to Choragos!
Please make sure you have read the CONTRIBUTING.md guide.

Every commit must be signed off (DCO) using `git commit -s`.
-->

## Describe your changes
<!-- Describe the problem you're solving and how you solved it. -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist:
- [ ] I have read the `CONTRIBUTING.md` and `CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md`
- [ ] I have signed-off my commits (DCO) using `git commit -s`
- [ ] My code follows the Go conventions of this project
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] `make test` and `make build` pass locally
